case_title: DYLAN DO VS. GLADSTONE LOFTS LP

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL PLAINTIFF INSTRUCTED BY DEFENDANT'S ATTY (LAW OFFICE OF HARRIS, ROSALES, HARRIS) TO SEND CERTIFIED MAIL TO DEFENDANT'S ATTY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DO, DYLAN AS TO DEFENDANT GLADSTONE LOFTS LP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DO, DYLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLADSTONE LOFTS LP $1,880.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF SEP-01-2016

PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,640.00 FILED BY DO, DYLAN AS TO DEFENDANT GLADSTONE LOFTS LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. NAME OF DEFENDANT IN JUDGMENT IS CORRECTED TO READ GLASDORE LOFTS, LP, AND NOT GLADSTONE LOFTS, LP. ORDER TO CORRECT NAME IN JUDGMENT WAS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DYLAN DO, ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES: $60.00 SERVED APR-19-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GLADSTONE LOFTS LP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GLADSTONE LOFTS LP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS: L. FONG AND P. NATT; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
